query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_authors,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avatarSource = 'google-imagen' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as meticulous_pipeline,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avatarSource = 'ai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ai_generated,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avatarSource IS NULL AND s3AvatarUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as drive_sourced_with_s3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3AvatarUrl IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_s3_avatar
FROM author_profiles;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute 
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_authors,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avatarSource = 'google-imagen' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as meticulous_pipeline,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avatarSource = 'ai' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ai_generated,
  SUM(CASE WHEN avatarSource IS NULL AND s3AvatarUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as drive_sourced_with_s3,
  SUM(CASE WHEN s3AvatarUrl IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_s3_avatar
FROM author_profiles;
